programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney becomes obsessed with busting a gentlemanly and famous jewel thief from years back

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch continue to uncover the clues that will lead them to the Las Vegas Strangler Hutch helps his troubled friend Jack while Starsky enjoys a brief encounter with a beautiful showgirl with a heartbreaking back story

programme.title: AIrwolf 218
programme.desc: AIrwolf 218

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack must track down an evil statue that causes men to kill the women they love

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio but gets more than he bargained for

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets Sonia and Froys repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife and when Lou and Sonia cant locate their target car Lou comes up with a master plan that requires some back-up TV-14-DLS

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate pointedly tells Luke that he is welcome to go fishing with Grandpa and Mac Maginnis and to do whatever he wishes for several nights thereafter but Grandpa steps in to make amends when he realizes that Lukes freedom is causing a genuine strain on their still-young marriage

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While in town one day Lucas runs into Tom Benton an old friend from his days in the army Benton seems to have fallen on hard times though as hes drinking heavily and winds up shooting up the saloon and getting arrested by Micah Lucas bails him out against Bentons protests but it turns out that Benton has his own reasons for wanting to stay in jail

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nora Sanford an old flame of Lucas who came from a wealthy family arrives in town ill and penniless When Lucas hears of her condition he goes to see her and help nurse her back to health It turns out that her recently deceased husband had spent all her money and she had heard that Lucas had also been recently widowed and in desperation decided to come to North Fork to see him What Lucas doesnt know however is that she didnt come to town alone and her plans for Lucas arent quite what he thinks they are

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E11 Extradition - Pt2
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E11 Extradition - Pt2

programme.title: Bonanza 305
programme.desc: Bonanza 305

programme.title: The Wild Wild West S02E13 The Night of the Skulls
programme.desc: Jim pretends to kill Arte Now posing as a wanted man Jim infiltrates a murderous clan where he uncovers a plot to assassinate President Grant

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble is arrested after a fight breaks out when the fishing boat he works on returns to a heated dockworkers strike

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A swindler Jack loves money and twins One day he meets rich twins that show interest in him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An aging puppeteer suspects his much younger wife has a lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Knight 316
programme.desc: Knight 316

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A frustrated dreamer turns to the supernatural to achieve success using an ornate pipe to eliminate anyone who gets in his way

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After teenager Adam is coerced into having a one-night-stand with Loni a girl he meets at a party he finds that shes looking for a more permanent relationship Meanwhile Adams friend Max is forced to abandon his planned summer trip and take a job in a pizza place working under his creepy tyrannical uncle

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E30
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E30

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E20
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E20

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS tries to blackmail the world when they get an atomic bomb

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pogo Lil is a female truck driver on the run from loan sharks She enters the Third annual Dixie crisscross race So she can win money to pay back the loan shark

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is ordered to purchase one of Chief Urulus islands for the construction of a radar station But Urulu - Knowing that hes got The Navy over a barrel - Inflates the price of his real estate to ridiculous levels So McHale and The Crew try to help The Captain out with a scheme to de-value The Chiefs land

programme.title: Mchale 229
programme.desc: Mchale 229

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jennifer overhears an acquaintance and his mistress planning to murder his wife on the ski slopes she and Jonathan jet off to Vail to prevent it -- but are they too late to save her on the ski trail

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna renew their vows - sort of Stef is Maid of Honor and George is Best Man

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: The towns snow carnival is in danger because there is no snow In desperation they turn to the only men who guaranteed snow for the carnival Larry Darryl and Darryl

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: A land developer has its eye on Camp Hollister so a mall can be built but the Major discovers a turtle living under the house which may be endangered thus preventing Hollister from closure

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A missing military jet pack washes up on the island and The Professor tries to figure out a way to use it for their rescue

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A strange woman asks Mitch and Garner to help to seek out her daughter who has accidentally becomes the only witness to a murder Meanwhile Mitchs zen girlfriend Destiny has some complications throughout the night after her bag is switched at the LA airport and Ryan gets ripped off on ocean view property she plans to buy

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work but have their anger management sessions had any effect Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls whove got the skills to protect their car Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when theyre forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients and Matt Lou and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The teams work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee his daughter and her rageaholic boyfriend

programme.title: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: George Babyface Nelson became one of the most important gangsters of 1930s Chicago by making brutal robberies In order to compete with Al Capone he allied himself with John Dillinger

programme.title: The Mad Bomber
programme.desc: The Police Connection aka The Mad Bomber aka Detective Geronimo

programme.title: Hercules 202
programme.desc: Hercules 202

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Renee learn of a facility where time travelers from the future are being held They try to learn from them what happens to the Taelons Sandovals wife is used as a pawn to gain important information from him

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A wealthy hunter stalks and wounds a rare hawk for a trophy Afterward the swamp takes Will into its confidence and Will sees the swamp as he never has before

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The body of a dead man leads Swamp Thing to Arcane and Gen Sunderland

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: Project Metalbeast
programme.desc: In 1974 an unhinged CIA agent injects himself with the werewolf blood he found After a killing spree his body is put in suspended animation then thawed out 20 years later by his crazy boss and a team of unsuspecting doctors

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Lonesome Dove OY 122
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove OY 122

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When the brother of a cop is killed along with the mobster he was working for the young officer is assigned to work undercover as a bookie to find out who ordered the hit Stone who is ordered to tell no one else about the mans assignment is concerned that the officer is too concerned with revenge to handle the job effectively

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Belzig head of a bank in East Berlin tricks unwary people anxious to escape to the West that he can help them Instead he steals their money and kills them Hes amassing a fortune to launch a new Nazi movement The mission for the IM force is to put him out of business

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The one-armed man is arrested in Los Angeles for fighting and police want the story highlighted in the newspaper to try and lure Kimble into capture

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While travelling cross country Victoria and Heath have an accident resulting in Heath becoming pinned under their heavily loaded wagon Victoria seeks help and turns to a mysterious man who is being pursued by aggressive bounty hunters

programme.title: Day of the Dead

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Keegan Oliver

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it
